dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5819 IH: Balancing Incentives Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Kaptur (for herself, Mr. Massie, Mr. McCormick, and Mr. Davis of North Carolina) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 35, United States Code, to require a patent owner to consent to the filing of a petition for inter-partes review or post-grant review, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Balancing Incentives Act of 2025.

section.header: Requirement for patent owner to consent to the filing of petition for inter-partes review or post-grant review
section.text: Title 35, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (4), by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;
in paragraph (5), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: the owner of the patent consents to the filing of the petition.

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (4), by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;
in paragraph (5), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: the owner of the patent consents to the filing of the petition.
